title: Expanded feature support for FIPS-Compliant environments
body:
Model Serving CPU and GPU workloads, Foundation Model API provisioned throughput endpoints (excluding LLaMA 4), Mosaic AI Gateway, and external models are now available in FIPS-compliant environments. This includes support for the following compliance standards offered through the compliance security profile:

* FedRAMP Moderate
* IRAP
* Canada Protected B

See  [Compliance security profile standards: CPU and GPU workloads](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/model-serving-limits#csp-cpu-aws) for region availability of these standards.

ref_links.text: Compliance security profile standards: CPU and GPU workloads
